title: [MTR4] Thomas the Tank Engine
description: A ResourcePack that adds Thomas the Tank Engine to Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![Thomas](https://i.imgur.com/C7arj8o.png)
The Thomas the Tank Engine Resource Pack is a fun April Fools’ release for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR), bringing one of the most iconic fictional locomotives ever created into the world of Minecraft.

Originally introduced in The Railway Series by Reverend Wilbert Awdry, and later made world-famous through Thomas & Friends, Thomas is a small blue tank engine based on the LB&SCR E2 class. He has become one of the most recognizable railway characters in popular culture.

This version adds Thomas into Minecraft Transit Railway, adapted as a joke release for April 1st while still being fully usable in-game.

The 3D model used for this pack was sourced from Sketchfab, where it was published under a Creative Commons Attribution license by Sea Land Air. The model was then edited and adapted by me for MTR, including reworked colors and texture adjustments to better match Thomas’ CGI-era appearance.

### Features
- Thomas the Tank Engine fully adapted for Minecraft Transit Railway
- Reworked textures and colors to better resemble the CGI version of Thomas
- Designed as a fun novelty / meme train
- Perfect for April Fools events, joke routes, or cursed railway screenshots

### Credits
- Original character: [Thomas the Tank Engine](https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/thomas-the-tank-engine-0ddc6ff6578c424cafb576a14aa5f101)
- Original Sketchfab model: Sea Land Air
- License: Creative Commons Attribution (CC BY)
- MTR adaptation, recolor and port: Vitor2005

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is a fan-made parody / tribute project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or an official product of Thomas & Friends, Mattel, Sketchfab, or the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

All rights to the original character belong to their respective owners.
